ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_ligand_complexes" (
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein-ligand complex */,
  "pdb1" TEXT /* PDB ID of the first protein in the complex */,
  "chains_pdb1" TEXT /* Chain IDs of the first protein in the complex */,
  "pdb2" TEXT /* PDB ID of the second protein in the complex */,
  "chains_pdb2" TEXT /* Chain IDs of the second protein in the complex */,
  "complex_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the complex */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the complex was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the complex was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the complex */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the complex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the complex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_functions" (
  "scoring_function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scoring function */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scoring function (e.g., CP_MJ3h, AP_dDFIRE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scoring function */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the scoring function */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the scoring function was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the scoring function was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the scoring function */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the scoring function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scoring_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_methods" (
  "experimental_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experimental method */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the experimental method was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the experimental method was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the experimental method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experimental method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimental_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "binding_affinity_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein-ligand complex */,
  "scoring_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scoring function used */,
  "experimental_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental method used */,
  "confidence_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the confidence level */,
  "binding_affinity" REAL /* Predicted binding affinity */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who made the prediction */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_affinity_predictions_confidence_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("confidence_level_id") REFERENCES confidence_levels ("confidence_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_affinity_predictions_experimental_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("experimental_method_id") REFERENCES experimental_methods ("experimental_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_affinity_predictions_scoring_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("scoring_function_id") REFERENCES scoring_functions ("scoring_function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_affinity_predictions_complex_id FOREIGN KEY ("complex_id") REFERENCES protein_ligand_complexes ("complex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdb_files" (
  "pdb_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PDB file */,
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein-ligand complex */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the PDB file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the PDB file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., PDB, CIF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdb_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pdb_files_complex_id FOREIGN KEY ("complex_id") REFERENCES protein_ligand_complexes ("complex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein-ligand complex accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the complex */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the complex was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_complex_id FOREIGN KEY ("complex_id") REFERENCES protein_ligand_complexes ("complex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_levels" (
  "confidence_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level (e.g., 0.8, 0.7) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the confidence level */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the confidence level was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the confidence level was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the confidence level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the confidence level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "experimental_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "experimental_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental method */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the experimental condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the condition value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experimental condition */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the experimental condition was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the experimental condition was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the experimental condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimental_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_experimental_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("experimental_method_id") REFERENCES experimental_methods ("experimental_method_id")
)
